title: Seeking Nominations for Advisory Panel Seats for Bering Sea and Arctic Regions
summary: The North Pacific Research Board seeks applications to fill two seats on its Advisory Panel. One designated seat will represent the Arctic Region and one designated seat will represent the Bering Sea and Aleutian Islands Region.
